title: Luffy Breathes Again
description: On pages 1–4, luffy breathes again focuses on Luffy, Arlong, Nami, Sanji as luffy is freed and confronts Arlong directly, shifting the battle toward its final stage.
scene: On pages 1–4, luffy breathes again focuses on Luffy, Arlong, Nami, Sanji as luffy is freed and confronts Arlong directly, shifting the battle toward its final stage.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Shahahaha... not bad for a pathetic human.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: But you might've been happier had you died peacefully under the sea.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Huh? No, I'm pretty happy to be rescued.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Do you understand just how angry I am..?

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: The seething rage I feel after seeing my beloved brethren be crushed by you pathetic insects...!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Within time, you'll come to see that you were better off dying peacefully in the ocean.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: I wonder if Brother Luffy'll be alright...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Even that fierce attack just now didn't affect arlong at all...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Enough about that! Just how far was brother Zoro sent flying!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: attack Luffy! I'll be backing you up!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: If he dies... you'll all be killed.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: And it'll also be the end for East Blue.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Do you know what hopeless difference there is between you and I?

summary: This part pushes the Arlong Park battle forward, clarifying who is fighting, what is at stake, and why Nami’s freedom matters.
